name_cn:
Top-tier factory with full packaging
In stock!!️
Four-compartment matte series in matte grey, featuring brand new diamond quilting and high-quality calfskin embossing. Paired with matte hardware, it is versatile and elegant, suitable for both casual and chic looks. The most unique four-compartment Lady of the season, a cool girl's exclusive bag 🥳
size: 20cm
